name: Chicken Murphy
recipeIngredient: 3 lbs Chicken thigh & breast; boned & skinned or cut up chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut sausage into 2 1/2 inch long pieces.
2. Cook in a heavy skillet, turning until browned on all sides; remove to Dutch oven.
3. Sprinkle chicken with salt and pepper.
4. Wipe skillet clean, heat oil and brown chicken on both sides.
5. Add chicken to the sausage.
6. In saucepan, add celery and enough water to cover. Bring to a boil, then lower heat to simmer for about 5 minutes, until crisp tender.
7. Drain, reserving cooking liquid.
8. Add onions and mushrooms to the oil remaining in the chicken skillet. Cook, stirring until wilted.
9. Add anchovies, olives, and capers.
10. Add drained celery.
11. Stir to combine.
12. Add wine and tomato sauce; simmer 10 minutes.
13. Pour sauce over chicken and sausage in Dutch oven.
14. Add salt and pepper; cover and simmer 30 minutes, or until chicken is tender. If chicken begins to dry, add a little of the celery liquid and a bit more tomato sauce.
